description: Fix critical issues found during code review: AI turn infinite recursion, provider fires after dispose, copyWith cannot null fields, and entry pawns invisible to tap.
steps: Fix GameState.copyWith to allow nulling out currentRoll and winnerId using a sentinel/clearable pattern
Add a _disposed flag to GameProvider and check it before notifyListeners() in delayed callbacks; set it in dispose()
Add a depth cap in GameProvider._scheduleAiTurn to prevent infinite recursion on consecutive bonus turns
Render start-area pawns near their entry corner on the board so players know where to tap to enter pawns
Add tests for the new behaviors: copyWith null clearing, AI turn depth cap, dispose safety
Run flutter test and flutter analyze to verify all changes
acceptance_criteria: GameState.copyWith can clear currentRoll and winnerId to null
GameProvider does not call notifyListeners() after dispose
AI turns are capped at a maximum depth to prevent infinite recursion
Pawns at start positions are rendered on the board near their entry corner
All existing tests continue to pass
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter test
Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter analyze
findings: All 4 critical review issues fixed. Used sentinel (_Absent) pattern for copyWith null clearing which is type-safe and does not require changing call sites. AI turn depth capped at 10 consecutive turns via a depth parameter passed through _scheduleAiTurn. Disposed flag prevents notifyListeners after dispose. Entry pawns are now rendered semi-transparent at their start corner position. Total tests: 152 (136 existing + 16 new), all passing. flutter analyze clean.
